administrative_fee.note: If renter is approved conditionally, may be subject to additional requirements.

utilities.program_description: All major utilities are already set up before you move in. No utility deposits, no scheduling service calls, and no waiting around for activation.

internet_wifi.note: Internet and cable not provided separately.

utility_billing_admin_fee.note: Also charged at account set-up and final billing.

rent_reporting.note: Residents are automatically enrolled in a complimentary 30-day trial. Service continues after trial unless canceled.

rules: Garage must be used to park an operable vehicle.
No street parking unless specifically designated.
Additional parking may be available at the community for an added monthly fee.
Select homes may have an extended driveway.

qualifying_criteria: Gross household income of 3x the monthly rent
Favorable credit history for all applicants
Identity verification, criminal background, and credit check for every lease-holding resident 18 years of age or older
All adult applicants must be qualified lease holders and sign the lease agreement
move_in_requirements: Pay first month's rent and any other move-in monies owed (certified funds required)
Renter's insurance declaration page with appropriate insurance coverage and your address
Security deposit due at time of lease signing
application_steps: Pay application and administrative fee at time of application
Submit proof of income (authenticity will be verified)
All adult applicants must be qualified lease holders and sign the lease
Security deposit due at time of lease signing
